message:
fix(runtime): CONFIG SET validation improvements

- CONFIG SET error messages now show actual invalid value instead of '?'
  for maxmemory, slowlog-max-len, and hz parameters
- CONFIG RESETSTAT now resets stat_total_commands_processed and
  stat_total_connections_received (not just slowlog)
- CONFIG SET bind/port now rejected as immutable startup-only params
- Updated conformance fixtures for new error messages and immutable params

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
